name: Bangs Middle School Gym
description: Bangs Middle School Gym is a place to play pickleball in Bangs, TX. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Coggin Baptist Church Gym
description: Coggin Baptist Church Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brownwood, TX. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Coggin Park
description: Coggin Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brownwood, TX. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

description: Texas 4-H Conference Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brownwood, TX. There are 6 outdoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, lights, and food. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.
